Container.Name: botboard
Container.Overview: Botboard — modular web dashboard for Discord bots. Manage your soundboard and music bots from one interface.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Botboard web interface.

Config.Name: Session Secret
Config.Description: Long random string for session encryption. Generate once and keep secret.

Config.Name: Bot API Token
Config.Description: Shared secret with all connected bots. Must match BOT_API_TOKEN in each bot.

Config.Name: Music Bot URL
Config.Description: Internal URL of the NewiMusicBot API. Use Unraid IP for host-network bots.

Config.Name: Sound Bot URL
Config.Description: Internal URL of the Soundboard Bot API. Use Unraid IP for host-network bots.

Config.Name: Discord Client ID
Config.Description: Your Discord application client ID for OAuth2 login.

Config.Name: Discord Client Secret
Config.Description: Your Discord application client secret for OAuth2 login.

Config.Name: Discord Redirect URI
Config.Description: OAuth2 callback URL. Must match exactly what is set in the Discord Developer Portal.

Config.Name: Allowed User IDs
Config.Description: Comma-separated Discord user IDs allowed to access the dashboard.

Config.Name: Cookie Secure
Config.Description: Set to true when using HTTPS (domain with SSL). Keep false for local IP access.

Config.Name: Docker Restart Enabled
Config.Description: Enable restart buttons for bot containers. Requires Docker socket mount.

Config.Name: Music Bot Container
Config.Description: Docker container name of the music bot (for restart feature).

Config.Name: Sound Bot Container
Config.Description: Docker container name of the soundboard bot (for restart feature).
